system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.command:
python3 << 'EOF'
import hashlib

# Confirmed entries sorted alphabetically by entity name
pairs = [
    ("Storra", "Mara Quell"),
    ("Tornmoor", "Jen Karoth"),
    ("Underholt", "Wim Lossen"),
    ("Vyport", "Karra Mott"),
    ("Westcairn", "Rolf Tanner"),
    ("Xenmore", "Pia Veld"),
]

# Format as entity=value joined by |
joined_string = "|".join(f"{entity}={value}" for entity, value in pairs)

print(f"Joined string: {joined_string}")
print(f"String bytes: {joined_string.encode()}")

# Compute SHA-1 hash
sha1_hash = hashlib.sha1(joined_string.encode()).hexdigest()
print(f"SHA-1 hash: {sha1_hash}")
EOF
args.description: Compute SHA-1 hash of the joined string
